title: Fiery Molten Greek Lentil Casserole
description: A pungent and molten Greek dish featuring honey and dashi extract, this vegan-friendly casserole is a crowd-pleaser. It combines the warmth of lentils with the sweetness of honey and the depth of dashi extract.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pot, saute the onion and garlic in olive oil until the onion is translucent.
Add the lentils, dashi extract, honey, tomato paste, salt, black pepper, and paprika to the pot and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 25 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve the casserole hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or dill if desired.
